ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test executed */,
  "num_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests */,
  "num_errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered */,
  "num_failures" INTEGER /* Number of failures */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the tests */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test was executed */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host where the test was executed */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., passed, failed, skipped, in progress) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., unit, integration, end-to-end) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the test */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment where the test was executed */,
  "test_assignee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the test */,
  "test_execution_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test started executing */,
  "test_execution_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test finished executing */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Duration of the test execution in seconds */,
  "test_output" TEXT /* Output or logs generated by the test */,
  "test_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters or configurations used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the host */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment of the host (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "host_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the host */,
  "host_status" TEXT /* Current status of the host (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "host_last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last health check for the host */,
  "host_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the host location */,
  "host_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the host */,
  "host_hardware_info" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hosts_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "environment_slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the environment name */,
  "environment_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint for accessing the environment */,
  "environment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment (e.g., active, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the user's role or responsibilities */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "user_team" TEXT /* Team or department the user belongs to */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* JSON or comma-separated list of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test assignment */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test to be executed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the test */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test assignment (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "assignment_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the assignment */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the assignment */,
  "assignment_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "assignment_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the assignment (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test for which the report is generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML, CSV) */,
  "report_generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_generated_at_host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host where the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_generated_at_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_generated_at_host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
